prompt: My NIP-05 verification isn't working. I set nip05 to 'Alice@MyDomain.com' in my profile. My nostr.json file at https://mydomain.com/.well-known/nostr.json contains: {"names":{"Alice":"npub1dp4rcz7ufm4rrequena8s8nh5aykdw9t7e2dj0gya9j9sskjhk0qdjd0lv"}}. When I curl the endpoint, I get a 301 redirect to https://www.mydomain.com/.well-known/nostr.json. What's wrong and how do I fix everything?
assertions: Alice must be changed to lowercase alice
The npub format is identified as incorrect and hex format is required
The 301 redirect is identified as a NIP-05 spec violation
A corrected nostr.json with alice in lowercase and a hex pubkey is provided
The corrected nip05 profile value alice@mydomain.com appears in lowercase
Server configuration guidance for eliminating the redirect is given
CORS headers (Access-Control-Allow-Origin) are mentioned as required
Hex pubkeys are described as 64 characters long
